Index.title: Next.js 16 Template with i18n and Shadcn UI
Index.description: A powerful starting point for your next multilingual, accessible web application.
Index.OmitRTLInstruction: To use OmitRTL, simply wrap the component you want to omit RTL support for with the OmitRTL component.

error.sorry: Sorry, we encountered an unexpected issue on our server.

Metadata.title: Next.js 16 i18n Starter - Multilingual Template by S0vers
Metadata.description: Next.js 16 internationalization starter with next-intl 4. Locale-driven currency, dates, and time zones for Arabic, Chinese, English, Spanish, and Japanese. Includes shadcn UI, RTL support, and SEO.
Metadata.keywords: Next.js 16, next-intl, i18n, internationalization, locale formatting, Arabic, Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, multilingual, starter template, shadcn UI, RTL, S0vers

Localization.title: Locale-Driven Formatting
Localization.description: Format prices and dates with next-intl. Each locale sets currency and time zone via getRequestConfig in src/i18n/request.ts.
Localization.switchLanguageHint: Switch language in the header to see currency, dates, and relative time update automatically.
